description_long: This is a small wooden cabin with a rustic appearance, featuring a gable roof covered in blueish-brown tiles. The front facade has a single wooden door, framed by thick timber beams, and is accompanied by a simple wooden fence that partially encloses the entrance area. The rear side of the cabin displays a large, cross-braced wooden panel, while the opposite side features a single, square-paned window. The roof has pronounced overhangs and decorative wooden elements extending from the gable ends. The structure sits on a stone or brick foundation, adding to its sturdy, traditional look. The materials and design evoke a cozy, handcrafted feel suitable for a residential or park setting.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, single door, window, and partial wooden fence, featuring blueish-brown roof tiles and decorative timber details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main wooden door, thick timber framing, and a partial wooden fence leading to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a single square-paned window and the overhanging gable roof with decorative end beams.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large cross-braced wooden panel and the continuation of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a window and a clear view of the wooden fence and roof overhangs.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with pronounced overhangs and blueish-brown tile cladding, featuring decorative wooden end beams
attribute_window_arrangement: single, medium-sized, square-paned window centered on one side, with no other visible windows; arrangement is asymmetrical
attribute_door_placement: single wooden door centered on the front facade, framed by thick timber beams and adjacent to a partial wooden fence
